decision.summary: The approved Card, current source/SPEC, canonical EX5 and tested binary are not one qualified artifact. No new performance run is admissible until the listed release gates pass without changing strategy rules or thresholds.

official_primary_sources.finding: The current 2021-2026 calendar lists the same regular-meeting second-day dates used by the source, including all eight 2026 dates.
The Board announced the 2025 and 2026 schedules and states that policy statements are released at 2:00 p.m. ET on the second meeting day.
Historical meeting records support the partial 2018 calendar used by the original frozen research.

economic_primary_sources.authority: Federal Reserve Bank of New York
economic_primary_sources.finding: Primary research documents excess U.S. equity returns in the twenty-four hours before scheduled FOMC announcements.

economic_primary_sources.authority: Federal Reserve Bank of New York
economic_primary_sources.finding: Later evidence through June 2018 reports persistence concentrated on press-conference meetings; this supports, but does not qualify, the frozen 2018 selection rule.

strategy_semantics_frozen_as_observed.entry: At the first new H1 bar at broker hour 21 on the calendar day before a listed regular FOMC decision.
strategy_semantics_frozen_as_observed.exit: At the first H1 bar at broker hour 20 on the listed decision day, intended to be one hour before the 14:00 ET statement.
strategy_semantics_frozen_as_observed.stop: Entry minus 2.0 times prior completed D1 ATR(14).
strategy_semantics_frozen_as_observed.position_limit: One framework-owned position on the symbol.
strategy_semantics_frozen_as_observed.news: Both framework news axes OFF; the Card describes this event-flat exception, but it is not a general FTMO news-compliance qualification.
strategy_semantics_frozen_as_observed.friday_close: Framework override enabled at broker hour 21; no approved Card evidence is present for this override.

risk_identity_conflict.disposition: Both identities must be evaluated separately; neither can borrow the other's economics.

binary_and_build_lineage.rule: The compile snapshot proves syntax only. It is not canonical, deployed or requalified and cannot inherit evidence from the older binary.

historical_evidence_disposition.rule: All listed performance evidence is opened and descriptive. It may diagnose identity and data faults but cannot serve as a new untouched holdout or release this contract.

original_research.disposition: Promising source-lineage evidence only; it is neither NDX Model-4 qualification nor current-binary qualification.

as_live_schema_v1_receipt.cost_defect: commission_model.degraded=true and NDX.DWX used a default forex fallback

q08.disposition: No pass promotion and no further parameter search.

q09.disposition: Opened, stale-book descriptive evidence only; it does not prove current-pair diversification.

broker_time_primary_source.finding: Darwinex Zero documents New-York-close server time: GMT+3 during US daylight saving time and GMT+2 otherwise.

data_and_time_readiness.theoretical_mapping: Because ET and the documented broker clock change on the same US DST schedule, broker 21:00 maps to 14:00 ET and broker 20:00 maps to 13:00 ET.
data_and_time_readiness.symbol_matrix_state: FAIL_tail_mid_bars; tail tick missing, mid-window ticks zero, and bars inaccessible in the recorded verification
data_and_time_readiness.history_range_registry_state: NDX.DWX H1 and D1 claim first_year=2021 while tester evidence requests/uses 2018 onward; lineage/coverage reconciliation is absent.

known_gap.effect: The 56-trade stream cannot prove complete coverage of all 57 intended 2018-2025 opportunities.

data_and_time_readiness.rule: The larger HCC is a repair candidate only. It requires provenance, session-aware continuity, endpoint proof and two independent identity reproductions before use.

cost_readiness.known_commission: DXZ NDX/US100 Index-3 commission is USD 2.75 per side per lot, USD 5.50 round trip; FTMO indices are recorded as commission-free, so the DXZ side is the current worst case.

future_forward_fence.rule: Preserve these observations prospectively under the unchanged approved implementation once lineage is repaired. Do not backfill, select among them, alter rules after any outcome, or label four events as a standalone qualification sample.
future_forward_fence.release_effect: Forward observations may add evidence but cannot waive Card, binary, data, cost, statistical or FTMO portfolio gates.

conditional_release_gates_top_down.requirement: CEO plus Quality-Business approve a revised Card that explicitly binds the 65-date calendar/coverage horizon, news exception and Friday-close semantics.
Card, SPEC, MQ5 and set defaults are byte/content synchronized without changing entry, exit, ATR, stop or thresholds in response to opened outcomes.
Compile and canonically stage one exact EX5 from the approved MQ5; bind MQ5, includes, compiler log, EX5 and set hashes.
Run the full qm-validate-custom-symbol DST comparison and obtain PASS for NDX.DWX broker timestamps; classify any mismatch as setup data, never strategy failure.
Freeze one NDX tick/HCC lineage with proven endpoints and session-aware continuous segments; do not cross gap B or D and do not silently substitute the larger HCC.
Produce two serial collision-free Model-4 runs on identical sealed inputs with byte-identical signal/close identities before evaluating economics.
Bind commission, embedded-spread parity, overnight swap and preregistered adverse slippage; reject any degraded or fallback symbol classification.
Apply the current low-frequency familywise gates exactly as frozen before the run; no threshold loosening, deletion of the 2023-12-13 opportunity, parameter optimization or post-hoc window selection.
Recompute synchronized marginal contribution, correlation, joint intraday MTM and FTMO daily/overall-loss constraints against the exact candidate book; historical Q09 cannot be reused.
Only the normal governance chain may release tester execution, promotion or deployment after R01-R09 are evidenced.

prohibited_until_release: Start an MT5 tester run under this blocked contract
Use any 2018-2025 result as untouched OOS
Treat elapsed January-June 2026 events as pristine OOS
Delete the missing 2023-12-13 opportunity from denominators
Optimize entry hour, exit hour, ATR period, stop multiple, calendar subset or risk after opened outcomes
Lower sample, PF, drawdown, cost, identity or FTMO gates
Silently copy the larger NDX HCC into a sealed truth environment
Claim that this low-frequency sleeve alone can pass an FTMO challenge
